//: Copy this file to app-config.json and point it at your machine. app-config.json is gitignored — your paths never leave this computer. Every field is optional: plutusRoot defaults to ~/Plutus, claudeDir to ~/.claude, scanRoots to <plutusRoot>/My Projects. Env vars ICM_PLUTUS_ROOT / ICM_CLAUDE_DIR / ICM_SCAN_ROOTS (semicolon-separated) win over this file.
